---
name: todofile
description: Resolve TODO commits in the repo and tasks in TODO.txt
---
Do a git pull to update the repo, then resolve all the tasks in the TODO.txt file at the root of the repo. If the file is divided into Tasks, complete the tasks in order and commit and push each one as it is resolved. Once everything is done, clear the contents of the TODO.txt file and commit and push that change as well.

Test the changes by running the integration tests (updating them if necessary for the changes).
